description.from: Deals 871(1+0.3Skill Level)+500.2% of Attack Power as Magic Damage to an enemy and restores HP equal to 25% of the damage dealt. For 6 sec, reduces the target's Attack by 20% and increases your Attack by 10%. The Attack increase effect stacks up to 5 times.
description.to: Deals 871*(0.7+(0.3*Skill Level*Awakening Coefficient))+500.2% ATK Magic DMG to an enemy and recovers HP equal to 25% of the damage dealt. Increases own ATK by 4% for 15sec. This ATK increase effect stacks up to 6 times.

description.from:
Moves to the farthest enemy and deals 484(1+0.3Skill Level)+278% of Attack Power as Magic Damage to the target and nearby enemies, increasing their Magic Damage taken by 35% for 5 sec.
If enemies remain nearby after using the skill, additionally uses [Absorbing Strike].
description.to: Moves to the rearmost enemy and deals 484*(0.7+(0.3*Skill Level*Awakening Coefficient))+278% ATK Magic DMG to the target and nearby enemies. Increases Magic DMG taken by 20% and reduces Status Resistance by 320 for 5sec.

description.from: Deals 458(1+0.3Skill Level)+263.6% of Attack Power as Magic Damage 4 times to enemies within range. You cannot be affected by status ailments while casting, and all damage taken is reduced by 50%.
description.to: Deals 458*(0.7+(0.3*Skill Level*Awakening Coefficient))+263.6% ATK Magic DMG to enemies within range 4 times. While casting, the caster is immune to status effects and all damage taken is reduced by 60%.

description.from:
When an enemy is killed, all skill cooldowns are reduced by 30%, and [Harvest] is stacked 1 times.
[Harvest]: For 12 sec, Attack increases by 80(1+0.3Skill Level), stacking up to 10 times.
description.to:
Upon killing an enemy, reduces the Cooldown of all skills by 30% and gains [Harvest] stacks 1.

[Harvest]: Increases ATK by 80*(0.7+(0.3*Skill Level*Awakening Coefficient)), stacking up to 10 times.

dark.from: Mana cost is increased by 1000, but cooldown is reduced by 3 sec.
Mana cost is increased by 1000, but damage is increased by 80%.
dark.to: Mana cost increases by 2000, but after using a skill, if there are nearby enemies, additionally uses [Absorbing Blow].

light.to: Damage is reduced by 30%, but the number of hits is doubled.

dark.from: Mana cost is increased by 2000, but [Harvest] is triggered once.
dark.to: Mana cost increases by 1000, but triggers [Harvest] once.

light.from: Mana recovery per second is increased by 50% per stack.
light.to: Mana recovery per second increases by 10% per stack.

dark.from: If stacks are 5 or more, cooldown is additionally reduced by 1 sec every second.
dark.to: If stacks are 6 or more, cooldown is additionally reduced by 1 sec every second.

dark.from: When hitting with a skill, reduces the target's Magic Defense by 6% and increases your Attack by 6% for 10 sec. This effect stacks up to 6 times.
dark.to: When attacking with a skill, increases Epis’s Attack by 4% and Armor Penetration by 4%. This effect stacks up to 5 times.

description.from: On hit, has a 25% chance to deal additional Magic Damage equal to {0}% of Attack Power and increase your Attack by {1}%. The Attack increase stacks up to 10 times.
description.to: On hit, has a 25% chance to deal additional Magic Damage equal to {0}% of Attack Power and increase your Attack by {1}%. The Attack increase stacks up to 5 times.
